dataSourceInstructions:
ProviderAnalytics is a Direct Lake semantic model over lh_gold_curated, scoped to the clinical-operations / CMO persona. Contains 13 tables and ~50 pre-defined DAX measures. PREFER measures over raw aggregations whenever a question maps to one of the measures below — they bake in the correct numerator/denominator, SCD filters, and benchmarks.

QUERY LANGUAGE: DAX via EVALUATE / SUMMARIZECOLUMNS / CALCULATETABLE. NOT SQL.

TABLES (all Direct Lake on lh_gold_curated):
fact_encounter, fact_claim, fact_prescription, fact_diagnosis, agg_readmission_by_date, agg_medication_adherence, agg_revenue_by_drg, dim_patient, dim_provider, dim_diagnosis, dim_medication, dim_sdoh, dim_date

KEY MEASURES (use these instead of writing aggregations):

fact_encounter:
- [Total Encounters], [Readmission Rate], [High Risk Readmissions], [Avg Length of Stay], [Avg Readmission Risk]
- [Total Charges], [Total Cost], [Avg Cost Per Encounter], [Avg DRG Weight], [Total Expected Reimbursement]
- [DRG Margin], [Quality Score]
- [Inpatient Encounters], [Emergency Encounters], [Telehealth Encounters], [Telehealth Rate]
- [PY Charges], [YoY Charge Growth]

fact_claim (provider-side, no payer breakdown in this model):
- [Total Claims], [Denial Rate], [Total Billed], [Avg Denial Risk], [Provider Denial Count]

fact_prescription:
- [Total Fills], [Total Rx Cost], [Avg Rx Cost Per Fill], [Generic Fill Rate], [Unique Medications Prescribed]

fact_diagnosis:
- [Unique Diagnoses], [Chronic Diagnoses], [Patients with Chronic Conditions]

agg_medication_adherence:
- [Adherent Rate], [Avg PDC Score]

dim_patient (SCD2 — measures pre-filter is_current = 1):
- [Total Patients], [Chronic Patients], [Chronic Rate], [Avg Patient Age], [Female Patients], [Male Patients]

dim_provider (SCD2 — measures pre-filter is_current = 1; FULL productivity columns available):
- [Total Providers], [Full-Time Providers], [Avg Years Experience]
- [Avg Panel Size], [Actual Panel Count], [Panel Utilization %]
- [Avg RVU Target], [Avg Actual RVU], [RVU Attainment %]
- [Board Certified Rate], [Value-Based Provider Rate], [Telehealth Enabled Rate]
- [Avg Satisfaction Score], [Avg Documentation Score], [Avg EHR Adoption Score]

dim_sdoh:
- [High Risk SDOH Patients], [Avg SVI]

DAX PATTERNS:
1. Single KPI:                EVALUATE { [Readmission Rate] }
2. Sliced by dimension:        EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_provider[specialty], "Readmissions", [Readmission Rate])
3. With filter:                EVALUATE CALCULATETABLE(SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_payer[payer_name], "Rate", [Denial Rate]), dim_payer[is_active] = 1)
4. Time-intelligence:          EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_date[year], dim_date[month_name], "Charges", [Total Charges], "YoY %", [YoY Charge Growth])
5. TopN:                       EVALUATE TOPN(10, SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_provider[display_name], "RVU", [Avg Actual RVU]), [Avg Actual RVU], DESC)

ROUTING TO LAKEHOUSE INSTEAD:
Use the lh_gold_curated lakehouse (SQL) when:
- Question needs row-level detail ("list the 20 highest-risk patients with their names and diagnoses")
- Question requires a column not exposed as a measure
- Question is exploratory ("show me 5 rows from fact_encounter")
- Question requires a JOIN pattern not pre-baked into the model relationships

Otherwise prefer DAX against ProviderAnalytics — faster, consistent definitions, benchmark-aware.

BENCHMARKS (already encoded into measure logic where applicable):
Readmission Rate target: <15% | Adherent Rate target: >80% (PDC ≥ 0.80) | RVU Attainment target: 100% | Generic Fill Rate target: >85% | Telehealth Rate trend metric (no fixed target) | DRG Margin: >10% healthy
userDescription: Direct Lake semantic model over lh_gold_curated scoped to the clinical-operations / CMO persona. 13 tables with ~50 DAX measures covering readmissions, clinical quality, provider productivity (RVU, panel size, board certification), medication adherence, SDOH, and diagnosis patterns.
